title: senecio leucanthemoides
intro: Senecio leucanthemoides, also known as the dandelion hawk's beard or white dandelion, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Senecio leucanthemoides include treating conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as supporting liver and kidney function. Senecio leucanthemoides can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in some herbal remedies and supplements.
